headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Public Storage, Raises Price Target to $319
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $300 to $319.
